series_metadata.series_description: Records generated by the agency for convenience with area business functions. Records may include information relating to staff, field offices, consultants, business contacts, agency contacts, legislative contacts, mailing lists, registries, rosters, informational directories and other information compiled either by or for the use of the agency that can be described similarly.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Documents are continuously updated superseded, or become obsolete. No RC-3 is necessary when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Documents are continuously updated superseded, or become obsolete. No RC-3 is necessary when destroying these records
